# Robert Echevarria

> Founder and CEO of Buildwise Media. Building in the age of AI — rationally optimistic about what's next.

Robert Echevarria runs AI in a real business every day. He founded an AI-native marketing agency that serves service businesses across North America, building systems that let owners stop trading time for growth.

## What I Do

- **Buildwise Media** — AI-powered marketing agency for service businesses ($1M–$5M revenue). Full-service marketing execution powered by AI agents and automation.
- **The Dark Factory Newsletter** — Weekly writing about building with AI at the business level. Not theory. Not hype. What's actually working, what's actually changing, and what to do about it.
- **LinkedIn Content** — Daily posts on AI adoption, business operations, and what the technology actually does today.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://robertechevarria.com/): Bio, positioning, social links
- [The Harder You Work](https://robertechevarria.com/newsletter/the-harder-you-work): Newsletter issue on why AI makes high performers work more, not less

## Location

Atlanta, GA, United States
